# Getting Support

## Documentation

The primary documentation lives at **[php.zeal.ninja](https://php.zeal.ninja)**. Running `php app.php` in the repo serves the same site locally.

Additional guides are in [docs/](docs/):
- [Getting Started](docs/getting-started.md)
- [Routing](docs/routing.md)
- [Middleware & Authentication](docs/middleware-and-authentication.md)
- [Runtime Architecture](docs/runtime-architecture.md)

## Bug Reports

Open an issue on **[GitHub Issues](https://github.com/sibidharan/zealphp/issues)** using the bug report template.

## Questions & Discussions

For general questions, open an issue on GitHub Issues and tag it with the `question` label.

## Security Vulnerabilities

**Do not open a public issue.** See [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) for the disclosure process.

## Commercial Support

For consulting, custom development, or commercial support, contact `sibi.nandhu@gmail.com`.
